'''Kiris 6''' was an asteroid in the [[Kiris Asteroid Cluster]]. It was around Kiris 6 that the [[Thrackan Sal-Solo (starship)|''Thrackan Sal-Solo'']] was built.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
